chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.D-366 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of M.A.No.1356/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 28.08.2025 Mr. Ashfaq Hussain Abro, advocate a/w petitioner. Mr. Riaz Hussain Khoso, D.A.G a/w Suhail Ahmed Khuhawar, R.O SEPCO. Mr. Asif Hussain Chandio, advocate for the respondents No.1 to 4. -.-.-.-.-.- At the very outset, learned counsel for the petitioner does not wish to press instant petition, which is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
